'''Skeezer''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Skeezer was dispatched by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Termo]] to the [[Yavin system/Legends|Yavin system]] to determine the fate of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. There, he was shot down by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] forces and captured. To extract information from the perfectly healthy Imperial [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] posed as a doctor and told him that he would need to be treated with [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] from the Death Star. Unbeknownst to Skeezer the entire supply of bacta had of course perished with the station. The panicked Imperial revealed that the Death Star's supply had in fact been contaminated. Upon learning that "Doctor" [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] would have to operate, Skeezer fainted. The Rebels then imprisoned him, but he escaped to [[Yavin 8/Legends|Yavin 8]] where he was killed in a fight with a Rebel pilot.

{{Char-stub}}

==Biography==
Skeezer was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] serving in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. Around the time of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], he was stationed aboard the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Liquidator (Imperial II-class)|''Liquidator'']] while it waited in the [[Delrakkin system/Legends|Delrakkin system]] for a communication from [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]]. The last that had been heard from the Grand Moff was that he was heading into the [[Yavin system/Legends|Yavin system]] with the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]] to destroy a key [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] [[Great Temple/Legends|base]] on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].<ref name="aoy4" />

[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Termo]], who was utilizing the ''Liquidator'' as a command ship, was concerned by the fact that he had not heard from Tarkin since, and had Skeezer sent to the forward launch bay and make ready to depart for the Yavin system. The captain was to take his modified and downsized [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruiser]] to Yavin, and Termo personally briefed Skeezer in the launch bay. Skeezer's remit was to determine what had happened to the Death Star and Tarkin, deal with the situation if applicable, and then return to the ''Liquidator''. The admiral instructed Skeezer to refrain from making any hyperspace transmissions lest the Alliance be listening. In addition to the cruiser's four crewmen, Skeezer would command a detachment of three [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] squads, and three [[Imperial pilot|TIE pilots]], who would fly the [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] mounted on the cruiser's external rack.<ref name="aoy4" />

==Personality and traits==
Skeezer rarely betrayed any emotion in his facial expressions, although the prospect of his mission to the Yavin system gave him cause for concern.<ref name="aoy4" />
